LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF SONIA MONTANARI'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. IT IS RULED UPON AS FOLLOWS: (1) OVERRULE PLAINTIFF'S DEMURRER TO DEFENDANT'S FIFTH THROUGH TENTH AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES BECAUSE SUCH STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS DEFENSES DO NOT REQUIRE DEFENDANT TO STATE SUFFICIENT FACTS. (2) SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND PLAINTIFF'S DEMURRER TO DEFENDANT'S FIRST AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE (COMPARATIVE FAULT), SECOND AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE (ASSUMPTION OF RISK) AND FOURTH AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE (FAILURE TO MITIGATE) FOR FAILURE TO STATE SUFFICIENT FACTS. (3) SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND PLAINTIFF'S DEMURRER TO DEFENDANT'S THIRD AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE (FAILURE TO ALLEGE FACTS SUBSTANTIATING A CAUSE OF ACTION). (4) SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND PLAINTIFF'S DEMURRER TO DEFENDANT'S ELEVENTH AND TWELFTH AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES BECAUSE DEFENDANT FAILED TO PRESENT ANY OPPOSITION. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF SONIA MONTANARI'S MOTION TO STRIKE AMENDED ANSWER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. IT IS RULED UPON AS FOLLOWS: (1) DENY PLAINITFF'S MOTION TO STRIKE AS TO DEFENDANT'S FIFTH THROUGH TENTH AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES BECAUSE SUCH STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS DO NOT VIOLATE STATE LAW. (2) GRANT WITH LEAVE TO AMEND PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO STRIKE DEFENDANT'S FIRST, SECOND AND FOURTH AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES FOR FAILURE TO COMPORT WITH THE LAW. (3) GRANT WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO STRIKE DEFENDANT'S THIRD AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE. (4) GRANT WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO STRIKE DEFENDANT'S ELEVENTH AND TWELFTH AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES BECAUSE DEFENDANT FAILED TO PRESENT ANY OPPOSITION. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-22-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF SONIA MONTANARI'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. IT IS RULED UPON AS FOLLOWS: (1) OVERRULE PLAINTIFF'S DEMURRER TO DEFENDANT'S FIFTH THROUGH TENTH AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES BECAUSE SUCH STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS DEFENSES DO NOT REQUIRE DEFENDANT TO STATE SUFFICIENT FACTS. (2) SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND PLAINTIFF'S DEMURRER TO DEFENDANT'S FIRST AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE (COMPARATIVE FAULT), SECOND AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE (ASSUMPTION OF RISK) AND FOURTH AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE (FAILURE TO MITIGATE) FOR FAILURE TO STATE SUFFICIENT FACTS. (3) SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND PLAINTIFF'S DEMURRER TO DEFENDANT'S THIRD AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE (FAILURE TO ALLEGE FACTS SUBSTANTIATING A CAUSE OF ACTION). (4) SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND PLAINTIFF'S DEMURRER TO DEFENDANT'S ELEVENTH AND TWELFTH AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES BECAUSE DEFENDANT FAILED TO PRESENT ANY OPPOSITION. (302/PJM/AP) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

MOTION TO STRIKE AMENDED ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-22-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF SONIA MONTANARI'S MOTION TO STRIKE AMENDED ANSWER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. IT IS RULED UPON AS FOLLOWS: (1) DENY PLAINITFF'S MOTION TO STRIKE AS TO DEFENDANT'S FIFTH THROUGH TENTH AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES BECAUSE SUCH STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS DO NOT VIOLATE STATE LAW. (2) GRANT WITH LEAVE TO AMEND PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO STRIKE DEFENDANT'S FIRST, SECOND AND FOURTH AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES FOR FAILURE TO COMPORT WITH THE LAW. (3) GRANT WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO STRIKE DEFENDANT'S THIRD AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE. (4) GRANT WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO STRIKE DEFENDANT'S ELEVENTH AND TWELFTH AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES BECAUSE DEFENDANT FAILED TO PRESENT ANY OPPOSITION. (302/PJM/AP) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
